name: Monkey.D.Luffy (040) (Alternate Art)
effect_text: This effect can be activated at the start of your turn. If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 "Straw Hat Crew" type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the top or bottom of the deck in any order.
